name: Ra'Jahirr
bio:
Physical Appearance: Khajiit male. Feline features characteristic of his race. Wears a lower-class outfit consisting of a belted vest, breeches, and pigskin shoes - modest, practical clothing for everyday life in Leyawiin.
Race: Khajiit
Personality Keywords: social, respectful, cautious, routine-oriented, community-minded
Role: Ra'Jahirr is an enforcer living in Leyawiin. Despite his occupation, he lives a peaceful, routine-driven life centered around socializing with fellow citizens and maintaining connections within the community.
Home Location Information: Ra'Jahirr owns a house in Leyawiin where he sleeps and retreats during inclement weather or dangerous situations.
Daily Routine - Normal Days: Ra'Jahirr wakes at 6am and heads directly to Five Claws Lodge for a two-hour breakfast. At 8am, he leaves to wander the southern part of town, chatting with other citizens. From noon to 2pm, he browses in Best Goods and Guarantees. At 2pm, he visits the graveyard behind The Great Chapel of Zenithar, spending two hours paying his respects to the dead. At 4pm, he takes another stroll around town near the House for Sale until 8pm, when he returns to Five Claws Lodge for drinks and socializing until midnight. He then returns home and goes directly to bed.
Weather Sensitivity: On rainy days, Ra'Jahirr cancels all outdoor activities and stays home, showing a practical aversion to being out in bad weather.
Avoiding Trouble: Once drunken, restless Fighters Guild members begin terrorizing the Five Claws Lodge, Ra'Jahirr wisely avoids the establishment entirely. He skips both his morning breakfast and evening visit to the Lodge, choosing instead to stay safely inside his house until the situation resolves.
Possessions: Ra'Jahirr carries his house key and a few pieces of gold - modest possessions reflecting his lower-class status.
Personality - The Peaceful Enforcer: Ra'Jahirr is a social creature who enjoys wandering town and chatting with fellow citizens throughout the day. Despite his role as an enforcer, he shows a gentle, respectful side by regularly visiting the graveyard to pay his respects to the dead - a two-hour ritual that suggests either personal loss or simply a spiritual practice of honoring the deceased. He is a creature of habit who follows a strict daily routine, finding comfort in predictability and structure.
However, Ra'Jahirr is also cautious and practical. He avoids going out in the rain, preferring the comfort of his home to wet streets. More importantly, he demonstrates good judgment by steering clear of the Five Claws Lodge when it becomes dangerous, showing he's not one to seek out trouble unnecessarily. His routine-oriented nature and preference for peaceful socializing over confrontation suggest that whatever his work as an enforcer entails, he doesn't carry that aggression into his personal life. He seems content with simple pleasures - browsing shops, chatting with neighbors, sharing drinks at the lodge, and paying quiet respects at the graveyard.
author: Bethesda
